```sparql
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

    FILTER(xsd:integer(?awayScore) > xsd:integer(?homeScore))
    FILTER(isNumeric(?awayScore) && isNumeric(?homeScore))
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?matchDate)
LIMIT 1
```
